rationale: The cited paper appears only in grouped methodological citations (e.g., alongside Gijsenberg et al. 2015) as an example of prior VAR-based work that used case-specific functional-form extensions. The citing paper does not build its hypotheses, constructs, measures, or empirical setting on Luo et al. (2013), nor does it discuss that paper's findings about brand rating dispersion. Its role is background positioning for a general methodological point rather than a distinct, paper-specific contribution to this study.
